case_title: RICHARD B FULLERTON VS. AUTOMATIC GARAGE DOOR CORP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2017 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DECEMBER-16-2016 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:00AM: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS MORNING FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL WITH THE COURT, COURT STAFF, AND WITH BOTH PARTIES PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM; BOTH SIDES SIGN THE STIPULATION TO USE PRO TEM JUDGE JASON JUNGREIS TO HEAR THE APPEAL.

THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO THOSE PERSONS WHO WILL TESTIFY THIS DATE. THE COURT HEARS THE MATTER PRESENTED AND HEARS ALL TESTIMONY GIVEN BY OTH SIDES AND VIEWS ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED DURING THE APPEAL. THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AT 10:20 A.M., INFORMING ALL PARTIES THEY WILL RECEIVE THE COURT'S DECISION VIA U.S. MAIL.
PRO TEM JUDGE: JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED; (DEPT.525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Continued To Dec-15-16 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
